seoTitle: Devon Hills vs Dilston — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Devon Hills and Dilston. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Devon Hills vs Dilston: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Devon Hills and Dilston.
heading: Devon Hills vs Dilston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Devon Hills, Tasmania and Dilston, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dilston has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Devon Hills (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Devon Hills or Dilston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Devon Hills has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Dilston scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Devon Hills scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Dilston scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Devon Hills or Dilston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dilston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
